description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named check-all-parts that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: python-scripts and golang-scripts. The python-scripts job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest, and checks various conditions such as Python version, requirements installation, ASCII filenames, image filename case, connector numbering, duplicate files, and SVG layer IDs. The golang-scripts job runs on ubuntu-latest, installs Go and fzp tools, and validates fzp files.
